# Concept Notes / Jibberish

Concept of Leaderboard:
You can take a test, that measures your reaction time, memory, etc... (general brain health)
We need to make it, so that you get a score at the end, which 1. will make it so that you can see your actual progress and 2. we will then also upload this info in our db in a leaderboard table, wiht your username, time and/or score necxt to you, so an online leaderboard. 

This loaderboard will have different sections:
1. Test-Section (for the general brain health test)
2. consecutive training days leaderboard
3. progress leaderboard (there are different levels of trainings, those trainings have a score lets say, if you complete a training you get a score added to your total score which is also in a leaderboard)
4. ???



Concept of Gameification:
There are a few ways we can go, here are a few ideas:
1. Cosmetics, that you can buy with points or a currency that you accumulate with trainings. You can also buy these coins in a shop (?). This is purely cosmetic and goes nothing, maybe you can customize your little avatar or maybe a brain or memory related cute animal, that you can then kit out with cosmetics.
2. (which we should definitely add) is the general brain health test... wherer there are some games that we can easily code, a reaction time game, a memory type game, a number concentration game maybe, some kind of sudoku and or cross word puzzles. This will also give us another section for the leaderboard
3. ??



Concept of Authentication/Authorization:
We need some kind of Azthorization and Authentication. Luckily, for authorization, azure already has some nice technology so we can use groups and users there, maybe even the ad that we can talk to with keycloak so pople can also use google sign ins? It also needs to be secure enough so that we can maybe create a mobile app that we can then sell on google play.
Maybe we have our Web Application and then a mobile app targeted to kids and teens with the actual cosmetics and shop in it? 





Concept of Corporate:
We need to somehow get our way into corporate... we need to provide the corporate world with some sort of feature/app/service that they can use in their actual company...
An idea would be an endpoint or some sort of feedback sheet that wthey can send out to their employees via link in a company email and then twhen they click on it they get a short training session and or gamifiacation session, or a session about burnout and burnout prevention? Something like that... maybe also a dashboard that the employer can then look at? But what shouls we show there? If we want to show actual work progress we would need to collect data and this could ger VERY complicated VERY quickly... but some sort of survey and or gamification way to teach people about certain things would be a good idea, no?





Concept of Trainings Videos:





Concept of Progress Visuals:
3D Brain that either builds a "neural network" the further you go, or a 3D cute animal or avatar that you can kit out... also old people in their 40s love stuff like that, you can also add people ass your friend, see when they are online, maybe write them via the platform and/or see their progress or avatar. 
Or we make it that the correct brain areas light up in a special section... but i would do that nontheless... i would add the brain with the highlioghted brain section that you are training in some way shape or form to the trianings so that poeple know what they are training for and go for a 3d avatar that people can kit out?


Backend-Concept
Each training module contains:

🎥 Training video

🎥 Instruction video

🧠 explanation of the brain effect

⏱ recommended duration

🎯 skill trained (focus, memory, stress regulation, etc.)


Example categories:

Focus training

Memory training

Stress regulation

Cognitive flexibility

Learning ability


A 3D brain model that “lights up” or grows stronger as users train.


Example areas:

🧠 Prefrontal cortex → focus

🧠 hippocampus → memory

🧠 emotional regulation


When users train:

the area glows

the brain fills up with color

new neural connections appear


Examples:

total training minutes

streak days

completed exercises

focus score

cognitive endurance



Example dashboard:

Focus training: +18%
Memory performance: +12%
Stress regulation: +25%
Consistency streak: 14 days

Instead of forcing users to choose exercises:


The system generates:

“Today’s Brain Workout”

Example:

Today’s session (10 minutes):

1️⃣ Focus exercise

2️⃣ Breathing regulation

3️⃣ Cognitive drill


Users just press:

Start training

This dramatically improves retention.



Streak system
Example:

🔥 12 day brain streak


Brain XP

Each exercise gives XP.


Example:


Focus training: +50 XP
Memory drill: +30 XP

Level system:


Level 1 – Beginner Brain
Level 10 – Focus Master
Level 25 – Neuro Athlete


Challenges drive engagement.


Examples:


7-Day Focus Challenge


30-Day Brain Upgrade


Users unlock badges.


Example badges:

Focus Master

Memory Hero

Stress Ninja




Possibly a Leaderboard?
Also, Feedback loop... after a training:
How focused do you feel?
1–10 scale

Track:

stress

focus

mood





Parent Mode (for tracking kids)?
Trainer Portal? For managing special clients or trainins themselves?




Start with simple tests.


Example:

reaction time

short-term memory

attention test




Every few weeks:


Re-test your brain performance


AI brain coach with Azure AI Foundry for later on feature... 




Corporate Mode... (anonymous feedback and or current health/stress/mental status) also for 
Monitoring for employers good!
